channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: >online dating is the future of lo-ACK! — 59 replies — 236.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Open thread • Replies: 59 • Updated: 2026-03-23 13:36 UTC

OP

>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Early replies (first 3)

62017513
>>62017496
We already had this thread. Bumble is merely a lesson in why women are retarded.

62017539
Its was just a way to spread stds to a control group of retards

62017623
>>62017496
Are these dating apps even useable on the free tiers? Any time I install one of these you literally cannot do anything unless you pay them some absurd monthly fee like $29 a month. Who actually pays for this crap?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62018215
>>62017749
Dude you had an Asian wife last time you were LARPing here. How many doctors do you think /biz/ has, you're the only one, this is a dead board

62018246
>>62017702
This is the truth unfortunately. Premium features + really good photos are key. Free tiers don't work unless you're gigachad or just get extremely lucky.

62018326
>>62018110
I don't believe you, post em.

62018425
>>62017783
you know exactly what it means

62018489
>>62017623
paying 15$ for unlimited tinder 'likes' on my trip in Spain was one of the saddest moments of my life

62018864
>>62018046
>hurr durr why cant i get matches
>what does netanyahu have against me
>this proves female hypergamy

idk if this is a pic of you but this androgenous creature looks and probably smells sweaty while at the same time advertising they are a gay drug addict.

even the drug addicted girls/guys/fags would pick someone that looks like they have their life put together and fun to be around than this sad loser.

62018879
>>62018172
if they do make couples, that is a success story and gives the apps credibility as they can be used to find love.

also, relationships don't always work out, and granted they found success in getting dates using them, they will likely use them again when they are freshly single.

62019047
>>62017496
I met my wife on Bumble. I met her because I had unlimited swipes because I bought their lifetime gold plan or whatever. Was surprised she matched with me. Anyway, we hit it off. Then we got married. Life was good.

A year and a half later I’m informed Bumble may have discriminated against me for age, because they charged more for their lifetime gold because I was old (over 35). I think I paid a few hundred dollars for it or something. Anyway, I joined a class action lawsuit and bumble cut me a check for $500.

Thanks for the wife and five hundred bucks, Bumble. Married five years now; she feeds me delicious meals, hugs me to sleep, loves me when I’m broke and when I have money cause she makes her own money. Life is good anons. If you don’t have that yet, I hope one day you find it.

62019061
>>62019047
What's your IQ, genuinely wondering

62019069
>>62019061
High but not autistic. Probably in the 130s? 140s? I’m usually the smartest person in the room, but I recognize there are some geniuses out there that make me look like a barn animal with their math and science wizardry.

62019087
>>62018046
>My family still don't know
>family
>don't
I'm not familiar with that app, but based on the text formatting, is that fucked up grammar Bumble's prompt?
I hate stupid people.

62019100
>>62017496
Bumble must be the best dating app. it's too good for its own good

>>62018172
this, and also obviously their best paying customers are people who have above average paying jobs, so mostly 25+ years old, and, unlike teenagers, most of them will be looking for long term partners.

62019110
>>62017496
>Have women make the first move
>Go out of business
Epitome of go woke, go broke

62019130
>>62018489
They're not even unlimited, you just get more. It's worth it if you're abroad though. I got a lot of action when I went to Brazil.

62019131
>>62019069
The fact that you think this kind of humblebragging is subtle in any way is proof that you're probably in the high 90s, low 100s at best.

62019161
>>62019131
Sounds like a lot of projection coming from you. It wasn’t humble bragging, just stating facts as best I know them. Comp sci major. I was into Apple stock in 2007, bitcoin in 2013, monero in 2015. I created one of the first nfts in existence. I tend to be ahead of the curve. But I also haven’t made any meaningful coding contributions to those projects, like the real 150iq people have. So I figure that puts me at around 130.

I’m sorry that makes you seethe uncontrollably. Maybe some more sex tourism will help with that.

62019168
Wish they had a mode that made it easier to anonymously find slam piggies to hook up with after they match you with a fat slam piggies to date

62019170
>>62017496
>Dating
Why? Just make money and move on.

62019184
>>62017733
he isnt wrong. im no chad

i just pay for platinum and the spotlight feature.

buy a plane ticket to a city with millions of people. anywhere on earth.

take photos on portrait mode on an iphone with 3x zoom.

get laid same day.

pic related .

travel, get new perspective on life get laid. why buy a car when you can buy an experiences

this is not a paid ad for tinder platinum.

yea she is 18 and i am 36. im no chad and no doctor.

62019188
>>62017496
I got laid numerous times thanks to OkCupid around the 2010's but after Match bought them and every single other dating app they've become a place for whores to shill their onlyfans

62019189
>>62017656
This

And then ((((((Match))))) bought every single dating app and made them unusable

62019192
>>62019188
Zoomers will never know the fertile plains of pussy that were Tinder circa 2013 - 2015. If you were white and vaguely in shape you could sleep with someone new every week with minimal effort.

62019289
>>62019184
>yea she is 18
>that ring
-_-

62019707
>>62017765
If you haven’t realised by now that (the sexual part of) abrahamic religions is just a two thousand year old incel cope, maybe it was always over for you.

62019711
>>62018215
Go see a doctor, you need schizophrenia meds.

62019720
>>62018879
Wtf are you saying relationships don’t always work out?! I have aproached a woman just one time during my entire life but i know the relationship dynamics of humans fully and can say that there would be a dream virgin trad wife with endless romantic and erotic love waiting for us all men if it just wasn’t for those darn jews!

62019725
>>62019131
Kek mistaking you being annoyed when other people openly talk about their romantic success with ”bad manners” just proves what an un-self concious midwit you are. Funny how it’s always mid intelligence people calling other people low iq because they can’t see their own stupidity.

62021049
>>62019289
they sell jewelry at the mall, sperg-kun

62021064
>>62019130
>Brazil
How big were the girl's cocks?

62021075
>>62017623
it's worth it if you're an attractive man and you don't want to swipe a million times for the algo to give you something worth looking at. got my current gf from tinder and I paid for it & I didn't think she would even respond to my message

D

R
U
G
G
E
D

61998901

61998912
>>61998888

61998913

>>61998888

62010074
>>61998888
okbye

62010178

Fuck off heeb

62011372
>>62004017
>I mean the world is on the brink of collapse
People hoard gold for the end of the world, anon. They think the world is ending, so now they are selling their gold. This is the end result of buying gold.

62011388
>>62010178

62013826
>>62010048
>>62011319
Here's the gold one, adjusted for inflation.

62013889
>>61998888
Gold is meant for you to go in-and-out of. It's money. That's why the bid-ask spread is so tiny compared to other assets. Compare that to when real estate rugs and the bid-ask gets blown the fuck out.

62014578
>>61998888
you think gold got rugged? wait until you see what happened to the fiat currency in your wallet. OOF!

62018505
>>61998888
Checked now it rugged

62018519
why they make couns of gold. They should make it of something valuable like iron or granite

62018806
I-I...I haven't checked my porfolio in a week lol

62018808
>>61998888
chinese old ladies were mass buying gold did you really think they were going to make it?

62018880
>>62018808
ouch...
I just bought 50g more of asian gold at 4550 last week because I have the soul of a chinese old lady

62018943
>>62018880
You don't because if you had you'd be selling the gold to a fat western pig

62018963
>>62013826

Also, I don't recall the collapse of the petrodollar in the 1990s and 2000s.

62018973
>>62018943
I'm starting to put all my extra monies into chinese old lady gold bars because it can buy me 10 ladyboys and a dim sum when times get hard.

62019090
>>62018806
I haven't checked in a month LOL
It's too hopeless I don't care anymore.
probably gonna kill myself before 2027.

62019602
>>62004017
people soon wont be able to afford food or gas why would they be buying shiny rocks

62019664
>>61998888
biz is the best top signal indicator. That and the moon boys on you tube.

62019685
I hate jew so fucking much its unreal

62019700
>>62019685
we all do...
but I hate americans more, because they have the power to stop them, but chose to obey or do nothing. their freedom is fake and the 2nd amendment is just for show.
3 weeks into the war and NOT A SINGLE protest on the street. fucking pathetic.
Their cowardice, their inaction would soon lead to the suffering of literal BILLIONS of people and their descendant, including themselves.
pathetic group of cattle.

62019745
>>61998888
IT KEEPS GOING DOWN

62019946
6% crash and its just monday, its going to zero, kekaroo.

62019955
>>61998888
So much for $10,000.oo gold lol

62019957

The orange retard would rather nuke Iran than disobey Israel.

62020897

62020914

62021050

OP

Some absolute retards were shilling BTC on this board after Octobear 20th.
>180k guaranteed
>super cycle bro
>just sell at 200k before Christmas 2025
>usually this feeling is right before it rips
These people are still posting. You might be one of them. If so, then this is just a friendly reminder that you're a fucking retard

62018481
Bitcoin will go to 1M, trust snailbro

62018509
>>62018470

Some mental defectives are talking about Bitcoin on this board that collect rocks and don't understand what money is and how it works.

62018582

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62018591

If you’re not jewmaxxing hoarding up all the gold and silver you can then you’re a tranny retard that loves white cock

bot this thread is not about gold or silver

62018686
Vgh sex with Elly SEX WITH ELLY MY BIG BLACK DICK IN HER JAP-RUSSIAN PUSSY BLONDE ON BLACK SAAAR

62018694
>>62018470
Guy at ny workplace told me he bought bitcoin at $118k.

I told him it's over.

I haven't seen him at work in a week...

62018810
>>62018694
Sounds like a /biz/ poster

62018844
>>62018470

>THAT DOESN'T MEAN IT WILL REPEAT!
>pattern repeats again

THE CYCLE DOESN'T EXIST BECAUSE OF SOME FORCED INDUSTRY BULLSHIT IT EXISTS BECAUSE OF HUMAN NATURE MAKING IT EXIST!

62018849
>>62018844
The cycle exists explicitly because most people will say "it's too simple", refuse to buy, then fomo in high and Eli needs my bbc

62019948

Indeed it will

62019984
>>62018470

item.title: Groyper — 10 replies — 19.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Groyper

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-23 13:13 UTC

OP

Been digging through archives on the Groyper meme. Oldfags who were around, drop any extra details or corrections pls.

2015: First known use of the word. February 28, Big Dog Groyper drops the term on /r9k/

2016: First known image. March 25. The smug fat toad with the iconic pose debuts on /v/

2017: An anon /pol/ post mentions Groyper is a toad and friend of Pepe. Later a Wojak version appears, and different Groyper variations spread on Reddit and Twitter as the default smug reaction. That_groyper Twitter account launches and posts exploitables.

Late 2010s–early 2020s. Fully adopted by the Fuentes crowd, becomes mascot for the e-right and later the Groyper Army.

2023. Same toad used for the first memecoin on TON, oldest living Groyper in crypto. Still active and updating in March 2026, longest-running by far.

Other Groypers appear on different chains. ETH, Sol, Base, Pulse etc. ETH version hit 20mil ATH, but it's quiet now. Sol one is the only other that's kinda still alive, but barely.

2025. Financial Times names "Groyper" word of the year. Ties it to ultra-right youth wave. NYT throws it in top phrases and lists too.

2026. The TON original pulled way ahead: active community, TON DeFi superapp groypfi.io Telegram trading bot, perps, AI agent, NFT/Gifts market, Groypad launchpad with biggest creator fees on TON.

From random 4chan post to the headlines to real DeFi tools on Telegram chain. Wild arc.

Anything I missed?

Early replies (first 3)

62020304
How do I profit from this?

62020427
>>62020286
Can someone explain to me the point of TON if telegram introduced stars to oblige the app stores? Been trying to wrap my head around that business decision ever since it came out

62020467
Easter?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62020622
>>62020427
>>62020427
Telegram is owned by jewish Pavel Durov, who constantly is selling TON to purchase stars. There is currently no value for TON, only massive sell pressure.

62020693
>>62020427

Ton is already used for ads, on the secondary markets for gifts, anon-numbers and usernames, rev-share, mini-apps, easy transfers between users etc. Every tg user has a Ton wallet ready.

Stars are just to comply with the app-stores "no crypto for in-app payments"-rules

Prediction: Telegram IPOs, takes over Ton or "deep integration", and makes a deal to use Ton as the native currency

62020801
>>62020286
His name is Easter the Toad!

I would share my toad folder (800+ unique toads from 2016 /int/), but I feel extremely insulted that you call that word.

62020824
Easter the Toad

62020937
>>62020801
Interesting. Don't feel insulted, I asked for oldfag's wisdom

62020956
>>62020622
>jewish is when you stand up to multiple ZOGs and risk your life for free speech

item.content:encoded:
kek baggies

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-03-23 12:40 UTC

OP

Lmaoing at the retarded newfags and poor shitcoiners who actually thought the bullrun was starting because Saylor (a retarded boomer) was buying.

You're going to love seeing BTC at 40k by the end of the year

Early replies (first 3)

62015916
>>62015910
$40k is pretty unlikely. Probably back to $65k though. I wouldn't be shocked with $60k.

62015920
>>62015916
you're a newfag who wasn't here in 2018 and 2022

62015941
>>62015920
This is my third bear, bro. Just buy more sats when you get paid with extra money. It's that easy. I retired at 34 years old lmao.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62015948
>>62015916
Unlikely based on what?

62015955
>>62015920
>History must repeat each cycle
You would sound like less of an idiot if we saw similar growth percentages during the bull market because past future present would mean Bitcoin should have peaked at no less than 180k. No market cycle is ever the same which is also very evident in the image you posted where we can clearly see volatility decreasing significantly which each cycle.

62016028
>>62015948
I saw it in a dream.

62016324
Every pump is a dumportunity.

62016392
Can't believe it took one guy to cripple btc last year, lmao

62016436
>>62015948
bitcoin is just too valuable to be $40k per coin

62016523
>>62016436
How's it valuable exactly? It's just a speculative asset to gamble on.

62016574
>>62016436
then why was it less than 20k not but 3 years ago?

do you not see how profoundly stupid you are?

62019930
>>62015920
Its so over...

62020774
>>62015910
>40K
try 5 dollar

62020816
Strap in for the adventure of a lifetime all the way to 0.00

item.title: OIL TO $150 — 81 replies — 65.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
OIL TO $150

Open thread • Replies: 81 • Updated: 2026-03-23 12:30 UTC

OP

Oil is at $98

This is the cheapest its going to get. If you're thinking of going long on oil, this is your signal. Once we liberate the Iranian power plants, every powerplant, refinery, and desalination plant is going to get blown to hell. World oil supply will be reduced for the next decade at least.

This is your only warning.

https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/posts/116269822349947644

Early replies (first 3)

62014848
>>62014841
Anon, your oil long is fucked. You should have sold at the initial spike of 125. It will never get higher than that. You missed the bus and have brought shame upon your village.

62014902
>>62014841
Hey buddy, why dont you look at futures for WTI. Notice a pattern? Why do you think its bouncing off 100 anon? What's Brent doing anon?

62014906
>>62014841
Oil to 200, then 150 is next bottom

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62017131
>>62017062
Do it and post results

62017142
>>62014841
if that happens the global oil market is not going to remain global

62018077
>>62017059
Years.

62018259
>>62014841
Oil is going to $180
Minimum

62018802
>>62014841
Oil is priced in
The spike came from how unexpected this was all since they though Trump was bluffing and then the big shock that iran refused to surrender after they lost in every western sense but still hid
The worse things get for iran the more likely you will see mass desertion in the irgc as soldiers leave to go be with their family.
Most are already not getting paid now because accounts got frozen and their banking systems were blown up so they can't process things normally.
The people are so jaded that nothing less than a nuke will change the price higher that its recent peak

62018826
>>62014954
>decentralized

62018876
oil will be pushed back down to 60 dollar range by the world governments like it always has been. If they didnt do that, you would have a much more difficult life

62018988
>>62014841
midwit take. 0 tanker traffic in the Strait is already priced in, it cant get any worse. higher oil prices is good for the US we're the largest oil producer in the world AND we just took all of Venezuela's heavy crude.

62019000
>>62015105
He literally is not, its a consequence of his neurodiversities and personality issues - worse, he is also incapable of asking for and following advice.
There are plenty of experts in the government who know exactly what is happening, why it is happening and how it can fixed in the shortest time possible, but not one of them is allowed within a hundred miles of where the descisions are being made right now

62019003

>Trump attacks Iran

62019009

62019056

retard goy.

62019086
>>62016905
I don't blame trump voters. he went all out on anti-war campaign and the alternative is democrats who have been ruining every single thing cultural-related like sociopolitics and entertainment with LGBT DEI stuff.
The problem is Zion Don himself for completely betraying his voterbase for the sake of his jewish masters
This war is extremely unpopular, the only group of people who support it is the jewish cabal in the government. If you want to stop this then AMERICANS have to go riot and use their 2nd amendment, but of course they're too pussy to do that. They can't even organize as the opposition party is also owned by jews.

62019961
>>62019086
The average white man especially in fly over country had objectively better lives in terms of income, upward social mobility, sex lives and even lower suicide rates under every single woke regime both with Obama vs trump's first term and now under Biden than under trump. The real spiteful mutants unironically ended up being MIGA and now they will freely admit to it. They do not care about making anyone's life better, even their own, just sucking everyone into their vortex of misery and spite. Objectively these people deserve to be punished and never be forgiven but they are natural cowards to they will try every dirty trick in the book to slink away from any consequences.

62019972
I cashed out literally every other stock I had ~2 weeks ago when WTI dipped down to the low $80s (2x leveraged ETF).This is the surest bet of all time, Iran absolutely can't afford to compromise on this and nothing short of a massive employment of nuclear weapons can open the strait of they don't agree. I'll probably cash out at $120 or $130 but there's still loads of meat on the bone (already up ~40 percent) I'd buy more if I had it.

62019995
>>62019972
...really the best now isn't on whether the true value is $150 or $200, but at what point does Trump intervene politically and through export or price controls put a ceiling on the US price.

62020009
>>62019972

62020012

62020264

62020281

Trump said that he had negotiations and war is over. Brace for the fact that the war isn't over and he lied about it again. And we're going to dump even more on those mindblowing news I guess

KEK GET TACO'D BITCH

62020312

item.title: oil crashing — 13 replies — 52.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
oil crashing

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-23 13:32 UTC

OP

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 99 replies — 44.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 99 • Updated: 2026-03-23 11:31 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61997405
100$ end of bull run

61997626
Just bought in, life savings. When does it hit $10?

61998660
>>61932834

This shit is going to 100 dollars isnt it

61998672
>>61997626
Oh shit anon. We should've told you that if YOU buy then it's going to 0$. You should sell and then after you sell we'll GIGA ULTRA MEGA PUMP to 100$+

61998866
>>61998660
Yes. Yes it is

61999089
>>61998866
Did you buy?

62000247
>>61999089
Of course. 100 DOT holder reporting in

62000433
>>62000247
It's over guys. This guy doomed us. Because he bought it's going to 0$. Please sell before I put my DOT into my cars brakes.

62004150
>>62000247
The moment you bough the whole market started dumping.

62007000
100$ end of bull run. Is it possible to keep the thread alive for 1 full month? 15 days to go!

62007009
How much are they paying you jeets to post here?

62007046
>>62007009
Well... The question is... How much do you want to get paid to jeet like we do? We can easily mog your jobs salary. JEETMAXXING

62007254
>>62007009
Zero. Plus im white

62008295
>>62007254
Good one dear fren Rajakesh Pujakistan. That'll convince him. Now post your white hand with a timestamp. Picrel is me and my white hand sar

62010139
So... When's JAM coming out guys? Those fuckers stopped doing the monthly development calls

62010191
>>62010139
If you're not a bot, here's a question: why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.

62010262
>>62010191
I'm really glad you brought that up anon. Great question! And if I want to answer it properly, like you deserve, my good sar, then I'll need a bit more information
>why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.
What do you mean by constantly humiliate myself? Can you help me understand that

62011878
100$ end of bull run

62014468
You did notice that the activity is actually up by a large % since Acurast launched their corechains (https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily), right guys?

62014587
>>62010191
False rumor about Gavin

62015928
>>62014587
Don't lie. Why do you think they call him WOOD? And he literally looks like a 7yo boy pedo, just look at him. If I googled "Pedophile" then Gavins picture would probably be #2, right after Epstein. And since we're talking about Epstein... Gavin and Epstein were partying all the time together.

62016012
>>62015928
Oh shit. You are a bot

62016043
>>62016012
Could a bot post pictures of his hands with a timestamp? Like I did here; >>62008295 ??? Makes no sense, right?

62016887
>>62016043
So are you for DOT or not

62016901
>>62016887
What do you mean by FOR? Could you define that a little bit more?

62016960
>>61932834
How does a thread with only 94 posts from 20 days ago exist? Dot fag must be bumping it everyday when it hits page 10.

62016999
>>62016960
Read this >>62007000
Also. This is now a DOT board. /biz/ was always a DOT board

62019865
100$ end of bull run

62019872
>>62019865
75

62020329
>>62019872
Dear Punjabista Rajakesh

We talked about this. I first write 100$ and then after it reaches the 9th page you bump the thread and you write 75$. Don't bump the thread before that or Gavin won't pay us DOT for shilling this project.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62015796

62015797

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62017543

62017550
>>62016764

You won't do shit and neither will any of the hill billies in the back water, faggot. Remember that time the shut down the churches for 2 years. Remember how nobody did shit? Stop lying to yourself.

62017563
>>62015789
Why the fuck did I listen to boomer bogleheads and put most of my money in the market. It would have been better off in a savings account.

62017589
>>62017543
Iran is really going and tryina get nuked

62017608
>>62015789
fingers crossed for escalation.

62017610
>>62017563
i know that feel bro

62017615
>>62017543
This fucking nigger is going to nuke Iran for the fucking kikes. Holy shit he's really going to do it.

62017625
>>62017543

62017643
>>62015789
Hi guys. My dad works in Hormuse strait. He just called me all nervous and told me that it will be closed for years. Then he said something like all snack bar said I have to sell my mustang and get a used prius, called me a faggot and said it's over. What do.

62017704
>>62015913
China, Russia, and DPRK are not giving the Iranians anywhere near the support they gave Vietnam.

62017716

We're only 3 weeks in.

62017721

62017738

62017817
>>62017615

62017823

62017855

> Several pastors, priests, and religious leaders were arrested or detained during the COVID-19 pandemic, primarily for violating public health orders banning large gatherings, holding in-person services, or protesting lockdown measures. These incidents occurred globally, with notable cases in the United States, Canada, India, Russia, and Montenegro.

its funny the 48 hr mark happens when markets are closed lmao 9:30-4 every holiday off in 2026 gay ass market

62019187

the only thing there is to do is get boots on the ground and drive the iranian military out of the cities so they eventually surrender or die from lack of food and water in the tunnels

62019528

62019612

62019615

62019731

item.title: >world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??! — 72 replies — 19.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
>world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!

Open thread • Replies: 72 • Updated: 2026-03-23 10:00 UTC

OP

>world go bad gold must always go up
>WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!
Is the most brain dead retarded take imaginable. These retards fail to understand the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.

Early replies (first 3)

62006969
>>62006961
These are the same type of people who bought gamestop btw.

62006976
>>62006969
digits... checked

62006979
>>62006961
Probably a horde of cunts started leveraging themselves long up the ass when the war started.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62012310
>>62012196
Stick a gold coin up your ass. If you stick up 60 silver coins you are a tremendous faggot.

62012611
>>62012210
CNBC are disingenuous and intentionally ignore how the political instability and the need unwind leverage are the reason gold is being sold.

62012673
>>62006961
>cash out all your gold
>yolo into oil
It's retarded but it works. They're probably overleveraged to shit on paper trades

62015367
Orange Man Bad about to turn off Iran's lights
BTC shits the bed like gold did
>the only real inflation hedge has always been bullets after all

62015386
>>62006961
I bought back in 2023. I'm not worried

62015392
>>62006961
gold drops when people know there wont be a rebuilding phase after an apocalypse

62015545
>>62006961
No. I will never buy your useless rocks, retard.

62015709
Price is malleable. Supply is not.

62015716
>>62006961
It doesn’t have to go up.all they have to do is make it unobtainable for normies.
Most normies can barely afford to fill their gas tanks or spend close to as much as the use to a year ago.what make you think they could afford to buy a shiny rock at current prices?

62015768
it's arabs selling their gold because they need cash since they can't reliably sell their oil

62015770
>>62007829
>Anon is jealous of
>>62006969
>Digits

62015784
>>62006961
Because when shtf people sell gold first to pay to have it cleaned up.

62016992
>>62006961
Gold is up 4% YTD. In the next two years we will see >7000$ Gold. Inflation and the decline of the World Reserve currency just started

62017010
>>62006961
>why is a shiny rock with no use case crashing?!
Truly a mystery.

62017033
>>62006961
When it hits six hundred dollars again I am buying and hodling

62017090
>>62006961
>the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.
which has almost no weight to the actual price

62017143
>>62006990
Give it a minute, wait until WW3 before selling.

62017279
>>62007712
I look like this actually

62018771
>>62017090
correct
the price of gold has been tied for the most part to a generation of useful idiots that have become a net negative cashflow this year and recently to the PBC and Bank id Russia having tried the most desperate re-hypothecation scam ever on the planet

62018796
>>62006961
>world go bad
>you have lot of money
gold go up
>world go bad
>while you can't sell oil for money and now need to buy food buy selling gold
gold go down

Iran middleast has back channels for selling. Gold might go further down when they sell gold to buy water. Desalination plants are next on the list

62018972
>>62006961
I can explain this phenomenon.
The thing is, gold is crashing BECAUSE it is considered one of the safest assets . Gold is being used as a COLLATERAL for debt.
But now the economy of THE ENTIRE PLANET is in the shitter thanks to jewish demons and orange man the jewish slave (I hate them so fucking much), people NEED MONEY to pay for living and debt, so they're selling gold. this triggers price decrease which triggers MARGIN CALL, which triggers another round of gold selling and so on.

tldr >>62018796

62018998
>>62018972
This will likely continue until the USD stops being a reliable method of payment globally. Gold and other PMs will become the universal currency between the various new blocs that emerge.

The death of the USD will raise gold prices in USD.

62019039
>>62018998
>USD is going to stop being a reliable currency
that's not going to happen in your or my lifetime

62019046
>>62018972
its safe therefore it crashes first

62019183
>>62006961
I caused this. I just bought 2 ounces of gold from my dad literally yesterday

62019242
>>62006961
The irony is OP is the retard. Imagine gloating over this. Ofc gold has to correct after what it just did.

62019643
>>62006961
>>62007032
Gold is falling largely from the liquidity squeeze in the broader world and middle east. Gold crashing is not proof that there is no risk or that gold is being priced as no longer the risk off, it is the risk materializing into markets and everyone being forced to sell what they have to meet margins/etc. Same happens literally every crash and literally every crash people act shocked and literally every crash gold explodes higher than it crashed from after.
>>62007658
Go back to rebbit.

62019669
>>62019046
Yes because people (and institutions, including nations) need to liquidate SOMETHING to cash out and afford necessities. big portion of that something is gold.

62019773
>>62006961
SELL SELL SELL

62019906
>just hold for another decade goy
bagholder retards, kek

item.title: Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now? — 25 replies — 19.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now?

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-03-23 12:25 UTC

OP

Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now?

Just met an old friend who was wearing a Canada Goose jacket and driving a BMW. But he told me he works in a shitty job and lives paycheck to paycheck but he seems happier than me who saves like a scrooge.

Early replies (first 3)

62019001
>>>/fa/ggot

62019013
>>62018960
Luxury cars aren't super expensive if they're more than 5-10 years old. People get too hung up on the make of a car instead of the year. People financing a 2020 subaru are spending more than people buying a used 2015 BMW.

62019020
>>62019013
you gotta luxurymax and go buy some confiscated drug dealer's bentley gt for like 20k. that's stealth wealth while still making retarded/wise financial decisions.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62019021
You'll regret it either way. Such is life

62019083
>>62018960
Imagine the smell, sharp pungent notes of onion with middle layers of exotic French cheese, with decadent wafts of Coco Chanel

62019095
Once both you and him are 60 years old with sore bones and failing health you'll be happier than him because you'll be able to afford to do things and he'll still be working a shitty job.

You'll look back on the time when you and him were young and healthy and you'll think "man, he was stupid, I'm glad I spent my youth working hard so I can finally enjoy my life"

62019107
>>62019013
You can get the entire engine resealed on a Subaru for the cost of 3 oil changes on the BMW. Buying a European car is like buying a luxury dog, the upfront cost is peanuts compared to maintenance.

62019112
>>62018960
I save like a scrooge because I enjoy sitting on a park bench or on the beach, which is cheap as fuck.

62019230
>>62019095
This except when I’m 40yo instead of 60yo

62019232
>>62019112
I recommend gardening. Not a joke. It's extremely satisfying.

62019600
>>62019232
Been there, done that. Too lazy. I love sun bathing though.

62020099
>>62020006
I'm in this picture and I don't like it.

62020246
>>62018960
He's happier because he's stealing from you to live the good life right now.

You save in dollars, put it into the bank and think you're on your way to doing well. Meanwhile your debt slave friend goes to the bank or to the entity which gives them credit or currency, that credit or currency directly devalues your purchasing power as it is created out of thin air as well as the interest, he gets to benefit now from purchasing limited goods and services and expending that currency into the system which bids up prices over time because there is more of it. Meanwhile your savings lost value because the prices of limited goods and services have gone up in relation to much currency you hold.

You can thank the kikes for this level of usury. There's only one escape which is to buy gold and silver but it's hard to keep that stuff because of inflation and the constant gun to your head that is forcing you to use to pay debts, currency that's pretty much on fire in terms of losing it's power to purchase real goods and services, all because they can print at will and goy cattle line up for debt and destruction because interest that doesn't exist can never be paid back.

62020262
>>62019600
>I love cancer rays

>>62019232
>I recommend poking around in the dirt

62020300
I actually dated a huge titted blond girl who looked like straight out of hentai manga and she had a master’s on fashion. She chose cheaper off-brand clothes for me that actually fitted me really well and made me look good. Really made me realise how much of a cope branded fashion is when even 10/10s would rather have their men wear cheaper clothing that actually fits them really well.

62020323
>>62019095
My dad felt like a depressed bum when he was forced to retire at 68 (law for teachers). Maybe if you’re some outcast loser, you won’t want to stay healthy and work as long as possible.

62020377
>>62019095
Life in your 60s is not as enjoyable though. Most oldfags regret not having enjoyed their youth more.
Also, most people that focus on saving end up with way more money than they actually need and start giving it out to their kids and grandkids. When you are in your 20s and 30s life seems way more expensive than it actually is because of the house, but once it is paid off, you can live comfortably on a near poverty level income unless you are really bug unto travelling and shit.

62020392
>perpetual poverty because you keep buying things you can’t afford to make people think you’re rich

Yeah OP, that does sound like a great idea. Go for it.

62020396
>>62020377
When you're old you'll be spending a lot on your health though

62020625
>>62020006
>>62020099
Raymond Thoughts and Mind
Hang in there and find God and a hobby.

62020691
>>62020625
that guy is fucking all levels of pathetic

62020694
>>62020396
No I won't
>t. EU
But even then it is still not as much as people think. Also, if you have kids they will surely chip in unless they hate your guts and, if you don't have them, you might as well just accept death if you get diagnosed with a gigacancer or somethibg like that when you are old. Serious health issues will leave you so fucked up that
Both my grandpas went through long cancer treatments and both said that they wouldn't have agreed to getting treated if they didn't have a family they still wanted to watch grow for a bit longer. One of them even refused treatment the second time he got diagnosed in his late 70s because the ammount of suffering to just lengthen his years of decaying health a bit more was just not worth it. Ironically enough the cancer spread slower than anticipated and he made it into his early 80s.
You only really need big money at those ages if your health is going to shit, but those ages are only really enjoyable if your health stays good.
Staying active and sleeping properly are probably better retirement plans than saving big yet people focus on the latter because of how capitalized and monetized our culture has become and our fixation on extending lifespans while disregarding the quality of those years.

62020699
>>62020694
>Serious health issues will leave you so fucked up that
Continuing to live for no particular reason stops being worth it*

62020724
>>62020691
For sure. That image is literally him.

item.title: WTFWT — 25 replies — 13.2/hr
item.content:encoded:

62020145
wtf just happened?

62020152
I FINNA BE RICH!!!

62020160
damn son

62020161
What the actual hell just happened?!

62020169
>>62020112
what the fuck is going on

62020171
>>62020161
The bull market started

62020174
i was literally blasting breaking benjamin while slitting my wrists and 5 minutes later im blasting K-Pop while goonin my penis. WGMI

62020184
How the fuck does it pump 4k in 5 mins. This is stop hunting. We are about to have a long and dead war. Trump gave the order to blow up that fucking power plant didnt he?

62020186
>>62020161

always bet on taco

62020189
Trump postponing attackd

62020192
>>62020186
this fucking clown lmfaoo

62020198
>>62020161

62020201
>>62020186

62020215
>>62020112
Wtfwt

62020225
>>62020201
>WITCH WILL CONTINUE
We are lead by a retard

62020249
>>62020112
gongo up

62020252
>>62020225
is that what gave it away for you?

62020258
>>62020174
Accurate representation of my mental states as well

62020368
>>62020198
this guys just a shameless market manipulating fucking faggot. This is unprecented. This nigger will fake a Nuclear countdown with shorts open, close short, open longs, and say Nuclear launch canceled. Fuck donald nigger lover trump

62020499
doubt theres been any actual talks with Iran, this is just orange man backing off from his insane 48 hour threat

62020507
>>62020499
